entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS619) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD TWO (2) INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) FOR PREMISE WIRE AND CABLING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3169.01E. 2. TO ADD ACCESS SHARED ETHERNET (MRC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3222.01E. 3. TO REDUCE DOMESTIC TRANSPORT, SIX SECOND INCREMENT USAGE PRICES FOR VOICE SERVICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3224.01P. 4. TO ADD TWO ACCESS SHARED ETHERNET NSC PRICES (MRC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3231.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS620) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. ADDITION OF BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3177.01E. 2. ADDITION OF EIGHT (8) SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3236.01E. 3. ADDITION OF MWLANS FOR MAINTENANCE AND SUPPORT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3164.01E. 4. ADDITION OF BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3172.01E. 5. ADDITION OF THREE (3) SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3186.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS621) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
3. TO ADD AN NSC (MRC) SWITCHED ETHERNET PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3184.01E. 4. TO ADD TWENTY (20) SEDS TO THE AT&T NETWORX CONTRACT SUPPORTING NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3242.01E. 5. TO ADD AN MMRC FOR A SED TO THE AT&T NETWORX CONTRACT SUPPORTING NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3251.01E.
SUBMITTAL AU3171.01E. SUBMITTAL AU3156.01E.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. ADDITION OF PREMISES WIRING ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBER, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3170.01E. 2. ADDITION OF 3 AND 4MPBS SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3182.01E. 3. ADDITION OF STORAGE SERVICES FEATURE PRICES FOR DATA MIGRATION, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3194.01E. 4. ADDITION OF 600MPBS DEDICATED ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3195.01E. 5. ADDITION OF SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3196.01E.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. ADDITION OF ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBER, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3167.02E. 2. ADDITION OF 3 AND 4MPBS SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3179.02E. 3. ADDITION OF FOUR (4) SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3264.01E. 4. ADDITION OF MMRC TO ONE (1) WIRELINE SED TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3269.01S. 5. ADDITION OF ICB TFS FEATURE PRICING AND CASE NUMBER FOR CLIN 0039044, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3176.01E.
